name: Spicy Tuna Dip
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 ounces Jar or can jalapeno chiles, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna and combine it with chopped jalapeno chiles and jalapeno juice.
2. Add the onion to the tuna mixture.
3. Stir in mayonnaise until the consistency is spreadable.
4. Sprinkle cilantro on top, if using.
5. Serve with tortilla chips, if desired. Makes 1 1/2 cups
